Protecting our Constituency from Flooding Flooding can have an absolutely devastating impact on everyone who experiences it, be it residents, businesses or farmers. Standing up for our Rural Communities I have always been a committed advocate for our rural, farming and agricultural communities and will always ensure their voice is heard in Westminster.
